name: pr_cep_ex_lazy_wedge
drl: rule R when exists D(tag == "x") P() then end
_finding: D-161 (THE WEDGE, fixed by widening the D-159 plain stash to Kind::Exists): the same out-and-back churn with UNFIRED same-epoch P's around it. Pre-widen, P3's per-arrival flush SPLIT the ph=1 del+ins re-entry pair (the dstash hid the del, the visible ins evaluated alone) and the exists child died PERMANENTLY - engine fired 1 vs oracle 3. With the witness ins stashed through mid-epoch flushes the pair reaches the fire eval intact and nets (D-081 machinery).
